source_jobs.title: CTO Founder Associate - internship
source_jobs.description:
HEALTH CAN’T WAIT.

Not for symptoms to get worse. Not for a six‑month appointment. Not for a system to catch up. But that’s exactly how healthcare works today. You wait, until you can’t.

Alan exists to end the wait.

Health is a universal right, and we believe this right can only become real when it’s coupled with prevention. We need to stop treating health as something we repair and start treating it as something we build, every day. It’s not solely a question of willpower. It’s the healthcare system itself that needs to work for everyone, in a sustainable way.

So we are building the new standard in prevention insurance. Alan is the first company that integrates insurance, prevention, and care into a single, acclaimed user experience.

We are on an incredible journey to build a global leading company, with a unique culture https://alan.com/en/careers. We already partner with 40K+ companies of all sizes, serving more than 1M+ members, and have reached €800M+ in ARR.

Prevention as the new norm. That's what we're building with our team of 800+ people. If it speaks to you: we're hiring across France, Spain, Belgium, and Canada. And beyond.


⭐ CTO FOUNDER ASSOCIATE INTERNSHIP ⭐

The position is open for an immediate starting date, for a six-month internship.

CTO Founder Associates support the CTO and Senior Alaners on top business priorities, such as unlocking new growth, driving alignment on strategy and building new processes/standards internally and externally. It is a unique chance to work on many tasks in a different and non traditional environment.


You will be highly involved in key challenges for Alan, and will be asked to support high added value tasks for Alan.


 
⭐ DETAILED MISSIONS ⭐

As such, you can’t be exhaustive on the missions you will perform as a CTO FA, as you can be asked to help on almost any subject. 
Possible projects include:

 - Tech: Exploring new technologies and their applications for Alan

 - Artificial Intelligence: Implementing internal solutions that leverage AI to optimize processes

 - Strategy: Contributing to company vision, market analysis, and growth modelling

 - Product: Identifying and exploring strategic opportunities

 - Corporate & Governance: Supporting board packs, legal research, and public affairs

 - Brand & Communication: Developing corporate presence at events and on social media

 - Growth: Coordinating RFPs, supporting marketing and partnerships

 - Recurring tasks: Coordinating the weekly internal communication, supporting the CTO with his weekly social posts, organizing the monthly event gathering all the Alaners, recruiting the next batch of FAs.

 - And many more...


⭐ KEY OUTCOMES ⭐

By the end of the internship period, the intern will have:

 - Created new processes and resources, and contributed innovative ideas to improve Founders Associates team efficiency and autonomy

 - Gained skills to start your own company as a CTO

 - Met incredibly talented and smart people

 - Collaborated with the CTO and other Senior Alaners

 - Interacted with most of Alan’s communities (Engineers, Product, Strategy, Sales, Marketing, Talent)

 - Gained a 360 view of Alan

 - Contributed to at least one strategic company project (new product launch, AI model implementation, etc.).




⭐ PROFILE & COMPETENCIES ⭐

 - Analytical sense and critical thinking: FAs possess strong abilities to frame the right questions, objectively analyze problems, and simulate possible outcomes.

 - Business and product sense: FAs need excellent understanding to think at the company level, assess cross-cutting impacts, and make sound decisions in ambiguous situations.

 - Execution and collaboration: The ability to orchestrate and direct people towards objectives is key, given the scope and timeline of work.

 - Versatility and education: given the scope of work, FAs should be able to jump from one topic to another with similar impact.

 - Organization, time management and autonomy: FAs must excel in ma

Prevention as the new norm. That's what we're building with our team of 800+ people. If it speaks to you: we're hiring across France, Spain, Belgium, and Canada. And beyond.




⭐️ THE INSURANCE TEAM ⭐️

Being part of Alan's insurance community is a great opportunity to have a significant impact on people's health and wellbeing in our multiple countries of operation.

 - We are at the heart of Alan’s mission, bringing to the team our technical leadership and expertise on healthcare and death & disability insurance.

 - We work hand in hand with our data scientists, designers, engineers and product managers to build the most differentiating products and provide a delightful experience at a fair price.

 - We build and manage offers for large companies and public institutions with our sales and account management teams.

 - We make sure our portfolio is closely monitored and risks are effectively managed.

 - We also manage our capital, steer our reinsurance strategy and maintain a trusting relationship with our insurance regulators.




⭐️ YOUR ROLE ⭐️ 

On both Health and Prevoyance businesses, you will:

 - Define and build the metrics, tools, and dynamic analytics to monitor our portfolio and forecast our margin

 - Own the quantitative metrics computation to bring added-value to strategic decision makings (portfolio repricing) alongside Strategy and Finance teams

 - Understand the margin and claims drivers on both gross and ceded business for repricing and offer guarantee adjustments (claims analytics)

 - Contribute to the reinsurance plans and support the renewal strategy in liaison with the Risk team

 - Support entities in new countries to define and build their own portfolio monitoring and forecasts




⭐️ IS IT YOU WE’RE LOOKING FOR? ⭐️ 

You would be a good fit if you:

 - Have at least 2 years of experience in insurance and portfolio monitoring

 - Are fluent in English and French

 - Are a master of portfolio analytics and  forecasts at the micro level

 - Are comfortable with SQL and ideally in R or Python

 - Are analytical and structured, with a fact-based decision-making style

 - Are willing to deeply change the insurance industry and challenge the status quo



For this role we are looking to hire within the C1-D level range https://alan.com/en/careers/a/salary-equity.

 


🌍 HOW WE WORK

 - Location: You must be legally eligible to work from France.

 - Remote work: We offer remote work flexibility, but we value in-person collaboration
   
    


🎯 IMPORTANT NOTE: WE HIRE PEOPLE, NOT ROLES.

If you're excited about this opportunity but don't check every box, we'd love to hear from you. Everyone, no matter how underrepresented, should feel free to apply, as it can only bring learnings or success.

If you identify yourself as a woman: Did you know that research shows women often apply only when meeting 100% of requirements?

Remember, this is just a guide, not a checklist. We'll be thrilled to receive your application!

 

🔖 Check out our Abou

⭐️ CSM AT ALAN ⭐️


The Customer Success Manager (CSM) is accountable for ensuring our health services are delivering value to our customers by leveraging different assets (B2B / B2C / B2B2C) to reach loyalty and satisfaction. 


This is driven by a clear understanding of customers’ needs, a stellar onboarding on the platform and a proactive product education.


Ultimately, the mission of the CSM is to maximize client's value through three drivers:- Maximize adoption of our health services- Build high satisfaction and customer's loyalty- Turn customers into brand ambassadors to generate incremental business through word of mouth.

To achieve this you will work closely with the Key Account Managers.
The work of the CSM should lead to less churn, easier renewals and cross/upsell opportunities.



⭐️ YOUR MISSION ⭐️


Build engagement throughout the whole customer journey

 - Ensure the successful onboarding of new administrators  and provide advanced product education 

 - Promote Alan products and services to generate massive adoption by the employees and the admins 

 - Handle admins incoming requests regarding operational tasks

 - Work alongside the Key Account Manager’s team during the contracts renewal period

 - Identify and execute out-of-the-box initiatives to engage Alan customers

 - Globally, instill a customer-centric approach to allow our clients to achieve their goals through Alan 

Drive change in our products and services, and act as voice of customers towards our product teams 

Participate to the team creation. The CSM team is still in building mode at Alan Belgium, so we expect you to have one foot in the present and the other in the future

 - Collaborate on building all processes and documentation

 - Connect with the other crews and communities at Alan 

 - Set the standard of what CSM should be at Alan! 

 - Scale the practice by writing the CSM playbook or taking the role of a referent among the team on a topic you like

Ensure client’s loyalty

 - Build and maintain strong customer relationships with key stakeholders

 - Display a customer-centric approach to allow our clients achieve their goals through Alan

 - Quickly identify potential signals of dissatisfaction, identify and implement solutions to respond to them

 - Support Key Account Managers during the renewal season



⭐ YOUR PROFILE ⭐


You will be a good fit to join the Sales team at Alan if you have

 - Proven track record in customer success or account management (minimum 3 years)

 - Strong client-centric mindset with experience in delivering tailored solutions

 - Ability to communicate, present, and influence key stakeholders at all levels, including C-suite

 - Experience in leading cross-functional projects with various teams (Product, Sales, Engineering, Data)

 - Analytical and problem-solving

⭐️ THE ALAN INSURANCE GRADUATE PROGRAM ⭐️

The Alan Insurance Graduate Program is a unique opportunity to enter the team at the core of Alan Insurance business without getting silo-ed on a precise role. The Insurance team focuses on innovating on our health and disability insurance products, over 5 geographies including France, Belgium, Spain and Canada. Through the Program, you will develop a very precious blend of technical, business, entrepreneurial and product skills.

After a 2-months onboarding, you may be involved in multiple missions in different streams of the Insurance team:

 - The Enterprise and Public Sector stream structures the best offers for our largest clients, whether a ministry or a corporate. They land on our most important deals (RFP - request for proposal) with our Sales team, contributing to business growth in a very visible way. 

 - The insurance product stream dive into the lifecycle of a contract, from pricing and product implementation to the renewal phase. They team up with Engineer, Data and Marketing teams to ensure a delightful experience to our customers, whether when signing on our website, better equip Sales with the best offers or undergoing the renewal campaign (offer updates from one year to another). 

 - The analytics and repricing stream focus on building metrics, tools, and dynamic models to monitor our portfolio, forecast our margin and price our portfolio. They push strategic decision making (like repricing) alongside the Data, Strategy and Finance teams.

 - The reinsurance and risk stream owns the Capital requirement model, the risk governance, the relationship with our Supervisor (ACPR) and the reinsurance coverage. 

Each program and mission will be co-built with you, to make the most of your growth plan and ensure you have impact and visibility from day 1 at Alan. 

All along your Graduate Program, you will also benefit from a personalized support from the team through coaching. This will ensure that you are never alone on a topic and that you grow fast, while still being in the driver’s seat. 

At Alan, we are at the forefront of the latest innovations in artificial intelligence. You will be expected to leverage every piece of technology at your disposal to contribute to scaling our tooling and processes.




⭐️ IS IT YOU WE’RE LOOKING FOR? ⭐️

You would be a good fit if you:

 - Have a first experience in actuarial/insurance, finance, strategy, data, quantitative or product topics.

 - Have a scientific background (statistics, engineering, actuarial science) 

 - Are excited about growing in a fast-paced environment on multidisciplinary topics involving technical, data, regulatory, product and business questions related to health and prévoyance insurance

 - Are comfortable with SQL or willing to learn

 - Are analytical and structured

source_jobs.title: Médecin Généraliste - Chat médical 🇫🇷
source_jobs.description:
🐻 Qui est Alan ?

En France, des millions de personnes renoncent aux soins faute de temps, d'accès ou de moyens. Alan est né pour changer ça — en combinant assurance santé et clinique virtuelle dans une seule application pour devenir un vrai partenaire santé.

La Clinique Alan réunit plus de 120 professionnels de santé disponibles 7j/7 : médecins généralistes, sages-femmes, psychologues, kinésithérapeutes, dermatologues, pédiatres, nutritionnistes, infirmières puéricultrices.

Nos membres bénéficient d'une prise en charge véritablement intégrée :

 - 🩺 Téléconsultation vidéo : pour les situations qui nécessitent une consultation médicale en direct

 - 💬 Chat médical : conseils de professionnels de santé, 7j/7, réponse en moins de 30 minutes

 - 🤖 Mo, notre compagnon santé IA : répond instantanément aux questions du quotidien, avec des réponses relues et validées par nos médecins

 - 🎯 Des programmes de prévention (mal de dos, gestion du stress) : guidés et personnalisés

 - 🧘 Alan Play : une approche ludique de la prévention autour de l'activité physique, du bien-être mental et de la cohésion d'équipe

🔍 Ce que nous recherchons

Nous recrutons des médecins généralistes à l'aise avec la médecine à distance et motivé(e)s à rejoindre notre service de chat médical - pour accompagner nos membres avec des conseils médicaux de qualité, mais aussi pour contribuer à la revue médicale de notre compagnon de santé.

 - ✅ Enthousisate à l’idée d’intégrer l’IA dans sa pratique.

 - ✅ Convaincu(e) que prévention et accompagnement changent vraiment la vie des patients

 - ✅ Disponible au moins 4h par semaine (horaires flexibles)

 - ✅ Statut libéral
   
    

🙌 Pourquoi rejoindre Alan ?

 - 🏥 Un cadre médical structuré. Vous exercez dans un cadre clair, conformes aux exigences réglementaires et déontologiques, pour des prises en charge cohérentes, harmonisées et sécurisées. Des médecins référents vous accompagnent dans les situations cliniques difficiles.

 - 🤝 Une communauté médicale. Vous rejoignez une communauté de plus de 120 professionnels de santé - médecins, spécialistes, sages-femmes - avec qui échanger sur des cas complexes, partager des bonnes pratiques et progresser ensemble.

 - 🤖 Co-construire l'avenir de la médecine. Quelle place pour l'IA dans le parcours de soin? Chez Alan, les médecins sont au cœur de ces réflexions et impliqués dans son développement.

 - 💰 Des conditions attractives. Nous proposons une rémunération attractive (à partir de 70€/h), une grande flexibilité d’organisation et l'opportunité de grandir au sein d'une communauté médicale engagée.

🐼 WHO WE ARE



You. Better. With Alan.

Alan's vision is to make prevention the new norm of care for all. Our mission is to help people live in good health to 100 while helping employers feel proud, turning health benefits from a cost centre into their most valuable investment.

We're building a vertically integrated health partner that seamlessly unites insurance and smart healthcare delivery into one system.

By connecting all aspects of care - private, public, and direct to consumer - we create the most member-centric healthcare experience. Through deep engagement, we empower everyone to overcome day-to-day health obstacles and live healthier lives.

We partner with 35K+ companies of all sizes, serving more than 950K+ members, and have reached 680M+ in ARR.

Our team of 700+ people (still growing) operates across France 🇫🇷, Spain 🇪🇸, Belgium 🇧🇪, and Canada 🇨🇦




🤘 HOW WE DO IT ?



People joining Alan are always surprised and delighted by our innovative working method. We have a set of cultural values https://alan.com/about/company-culture that guide our approach to work, such as:



🎯 What drives us — We're obsessed with helping our members live healthier

 1. Mission is the Boss: long-term thinking, seeking our mission success above all else.

 2. Member & customer-led: obsessively focused on solving members & customers problems and creating the most delightful experiences.
    
    

🏆 How we build excellence — We hire the best people and give them platform to succeed

 1. Champions of excellence: extremely high standards and talent density.

 2. Distributed ownership: accountable enlightened despots, everyone owns their decisions and results.

 3. Radically transparent: all information is accessible and written-first, so everyone can make the best decisions asynchronously
    
    

🤝 How we grow together — We help each other improve through honest feedback and bold thinking

 1. Optimistic alchemy: optimists who collaborate with genuine care and support teammates.

 2. Empathetic challengers: direct, caring feedback combined with praises to help each other grow professionally

 3. Bold & creative contrarians: think differently to achieve greatness, try new approaches
    
    

⚡ How we move fast — We fight complexity and focus on what matters most

 1. Disciplined in execution: taking decisive actions with focus that compounds success over time

 2. Fight for simplicity: only high impact processes, smart frugality
    
    


👉 ABOUT THE ROLE



Product designers at Alan are at the forefront of building our product(s), taking them from inception to completion. They work hand in hand with product managers, researchers, and engineers to ensure we create meaningful and human experiences that improve the health of our members.



The community of designers is vibrant and inclusive

source_jobs.title: Freelance Dermatologist - France 🇫🇷
source_jobs.description:
🐻 Qui est Alan ?

Alan est une assurance santé qui met l'accent sur la prévention et l'accès aux meilleurs soins pour tous. Nous avons donc créé une clinique virtuelle qui regroupe plus de 100 professionnels de santé couvrant des domaines comme la nutrition, la dermatologie, le sommeil et le mal de dos.

🔍 Que recherchons-nous ?

Nous recrutons aujourd’hui des dermatologues pour poursuivre le développement de notre service de messagerie par chat.

Ce service met en relation les assurés avec des médecins par messagerie 7 jours sur 7, avec comme priorités d’assurer la sécurité des données et un secret médical absolu (aucune visibilité de l’assurance sur les conversations).

Il ne s’agit pas de téléconsultation, mais plutôt de téléconseil. Il n’y a pas de rédaction d’ordonnance, et le tout se fait par écrit.

Nous comptons déjà une dermatologue dans l’équipe et nous en cherchons un(e) autre qui serait intéressé(e) pour nous rejoindre et répondre aux questions !

👨‍⚕️ Quel profil nous intéresse ?

Nous recherchons des dermatologues ayant envie d’aider nos membres via notre chat médical: un format proche de la télé-expertise. Il est important pour nous que vous ne partagiez pas seulement des conseils médicaux, mais aussi de veiller à la manière dont vous les communiquez, en faisant preuve de bienveillance et de compréhension.

Est-ce que vous vous reconnaissez dans ce profil ?

 - Minimum 2 ans d’expérience

 - A l’aise avec le digital

 - Disponible au moins 4/5h par semaine (flexibles) pour réaliser le suivi par chat

 - Statut auto-entrepreneur ou libéral

 - Situé en France Métropolitaine

🙌 Avantages et privilèges

source_jobs.title: Médecin généraliste - Téléconsultation (CDI) 🇫🇷
source_jobs.description:
🐻 Qui est Alan ?

En France, des millions de personnes renoncent aux soins faute de temps, d'accès ou de moyens. Alan est né pour changer ça — en combinant assurance santé et clinique virtuelle dans une seule application pour devenir un vrai partenaire santé.

La Clinique Alan réunit plus de 120 professionnels de santé disponibles 7j/7 : médecins généralistes, sages-femmes, psychologues, kinésithérapeutes, dermatologues, pédiatres, nutritionnistes, infirmières puéricultrices.

Nos membres bénéficient d'une prise en charge véritablement intégrée :

 - 🩺 Téléconsultation vidéo : pour les situations qui nécessitent une consultation médicale en direct

 - 💬 Chat médical : conseils de professionnels de santé, 7j/7, réponse en moins de 30 minutes

 - 🤖 Mo, notre compagnon santé IA : répond instantanément aux questions du quotidien, avec des réponses relues et validées par nos médecins

 - 🎯 Des programmes de prévention (mal de dos, gestion du stress) : guidés et personnalisés

 - 🧘 Alan Play : une approche ludique de la prévention autour de l'activité physique, du bien-être mental et de la cohésion d'équipe

🔍 Ce que nous recherchons

Nous recrutons des médecins généralistes à l'aise avec le soin à distance et motivé(e)s pour nous rejoindre sur notre service de téléconsultation. Ce qui compte pour nous autant que vos compétences médicales : votre capacité à créer une relation de confiance à distance, avec bienveillance et sans compromis sur la qualité des soins.

 - ✅ À l'aise avec les outils numériques

 - ✅ Disponible au moins 4h par semaine (horaires flexibles)

 - ✅ Statut salarié

 - ✅ Convaincu(e) que prévention et accompagnement changent vraiment la vie des patients

🙌 Pourquoi rejoindre Alan ?

 - 🏥 Un cadre médical structuré. Vous exercez dans un cadre clair, conformes aux exigences réglementaires et déontologiques, pour des prises en charge cohérentes, harmonisées et sécurisées. Des médecins référents vous accompagnent dans les situations cliniques difficiles, des pairs sont disponibles pour échanger, et vous pouvez solliciter des spécialistes de l'équipe comme dans une vraie structure de soin.

 - ✨ Une médecine de qualité. Grâce au chat médical et à Mo, chaque membre est orienté vers le bon parcours avant même de consulter. Quand une téléconsultation a lieu, elle est vraiment nécessaire. Vous pouvez accorder le temps qu'il faut à chaque patient, sans pression sur le nombre de consultations.

 - 🤖 Co-construire l'avenir de la médecine. Quelle place pour l'IA dans le parcours de soin ? Chez Alan, les médecins sont au cœur de ces réflexions et contribuent à faire évoluer les pratiques.

 - 💰 Des conditions attractives. Nous proposons une rémunération attractive (à partir de 72€/h), une flexibilité d’organisation et l'opportunité de grandir au sein d'une communauté médicale engagée, ainsi que la mutuelle Alan prise en charge à 100 % !

source_jobs.description:
🤖 WHO WE ARE

We’re building Mo — a health companion for everyone.

We’re a small team within Alan, on a mission to redefine the future of care by democratizing access to medical expertise. We are building Mo, an intelligent, empathetic, multimodal LLM-based conversational AI assistant able to prescribe, triage, and proactively follow up on care.

Imagine giving every person in the world instant, 24/7 access to personalised medical expertise - through chat, voice, or video. That’s what we are building 🤖.

We kicked off the project in 2023, and we have launched Mo to all our french members (1M) in Q1 2026, making it the first safe AI health companion live at scale in Europe.




🚀 WHAT KEEPS US UP AT NIGHT

We’re building a medical agent that works — reliably, safely, and at scale.

You’ll work at the intersection of product engineering, ML engineering, and medical expertise. Our mission is to build the most accurate and reliable medical agent in the world, while delivering an outstanding conversational experience. Things we’re working on:

 - 💬 Deliver the most memorable chatting experience — You’ll work on making Mo the obvious choice when it comes to asking a health question. It means having a world-class snappy and delightful chatting experience, blazing fast time to answer, and rich content shared.

 - 🧱 Integrate Mo with Alan services and our healthcare system — You’ll work on integrating Mo with our other services (digital chat with HP, map of physical location of HPs, tailored prevention programs, …) to help members get from words to actions.

 - ➕ Extend our architecture to support the next chapters of Mo — You’ll work on our architecture, and agentic framework, to support Mo’s next needs (get more context, use new skills, be accessible in other countries we operate in)



If you’re excited by the idea of building the future of healthcare, this is the team for you - we're at the start of the journey. If you’re curious, here https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.12808 is a paper we published recently.





🎯 IS IT YOU WE’RE LOOKING FOR?

We’re looking for Product engineers with 3+ years of experience who get excited about building state-of-the-art AI systems and applying them to real-world, high-stakes problems in healthcare.

 - You’ll work at the frontier of LLMs, multi-agent architectures, and human-in-the-loop learning — and see your work deployed in production, helping real people.

 - You’ll implement new capabilities for Mo, working across engineering, data, and medical expertise

 - You'll have deep product ownership over the use cases supported in Mo, making sure we actually help our members get and stay better.

 - You’ll have significant influence on system architecture and code quality

 - You’ll mentor engineers, contribute to our product & engineering culture, and help build the team (including participating in hiring, shaping our interview loops, etc.).

You would be a good fit in Mo if most of this sounds like you:

 - Applied background in software engineering and systems architecture

 - Experience with traditional ML, or LLMs, or ML dev ops is a big plus.

 - Product-minded: you want your solutions to be used, and impactful

 - Self-directed, pragmatic, driven, hard working

 - Humble and still willing to grow (no matter your seniority!)

 - Collaborative, enthusiastic about teamwork, learning, and teaching

 - Fluent in English (no need to speak French!)

 - Ex-founders are typically great fit in our team

But above all, we are looking for high potential and curiosity: make sure to show us this when you apply! Everything else is a bonus.




🤘 HOW WE DO IT ?

We benefit from Alan’s platform, infrastructure, distribution, and health expertise — but operate with the speed and focus of a startup. If you’re curious about Alan’s broader vision, our https://www.notion.so/alaninsuranceShareholder Letters https://alan.com/en/blog/discover-alan/a/alan-2025-q3-letter-to-shareholders are worth a read.

source_jobs.title: Médecin généraliste installé(e) - Téléconsultation (contrat freelance) 🇫🇷
source_jobs.description:
🐻 Qui est Alan ?

En France, des millions de personnes renoncent aux soins faute de temps, d'accès ou de moyens. Alan est né pour changer ça — en combinant assurance santé et clinique virtuelle dans une seule application pour devenir un vrai partenaire santé.

La Clinique Alan réunit plus de 120 professionnels de santé disponibles 7j/7 : médecins généralistes, sages-femmes, psychologues, kinésithérapeutes, dermatologues, pédiatres, nutritionnistes, infirmières puéricultrices.

Nos membres bénéficient d'une prise en charge véritablement intégrée :

 - 🩺 Téléconsultation vidéo : pour les situations qui nécessitent une consultation médicale en direct

 - 💬 Chat médical : conseils de professionnels de santé, 7j/7, réponse en moins de 30 minutes

 - 🤖 Mo, notre compagnon santé IA : répond instantanément aux questions du quotidien, avec des réponses relues et validées par nos médecins

 - 🎯 Des programmes de prévention (mal de dos, gestion du stress) : guidés et personnalisés

 - 🧘 Alan Play : une approche ludique de la prévention autour de l'activité physique, du bien-être mental et de la cohésion d'équipe

🔍 Ce que nous recherchons

Nous recrutons des médecins généralistes à l'aise avec le soin à distance et motivé(e)s pour nous rejoindre sur notre service de téléconsultation. Ce qui compte pour nous autant que vos compétences médicales : votre capacité à créer une relation de confiance à distance, avec bienveillance et sans compromis sur la qualité des soins.

 - ✅ À l'aise avec les outils numériques

 - ✅ Disponible au moins 4h par semaine (horaires flexibles)

 - ✅ Statut libéral et installé(e) en France

 - ✅ Convaincu(e) que prévention et accompagnement changent vraiment la vie des patients

🙌 Pourquoi rejoindre Alan ?

 - 🏥 Un cadre médical structuré. Vous exercez dans un cadre clair, conformes aux exigences réglementaires et déontologiques, pour des prises en charge cohérentes, harmonisées et sécurisées. Des médecins référents vous accompagnent dans les situations cliniques difficiles, des pairs sont disponibles pour échanger, et vous pouvez solliciter des spécialistes de l'équipe comme dans une vraie structure de soin.

 - ✨ Une médecine de qualité. Grâce au chat médical et à Mo, chaque membre est orienté vers le bon parcours avant même de consulter. Quand une téléconsultation a lieu, elle est vraiment nécessaire. Vous pouvez accorder le temps qu'il faut à chaque patient, sans pression sur le nombre de consultations.

 - 🤖 Co-construire l'avenir de la médecine. Quelle place pour l'IA dans le parcours de soin ? Chez Alan, les médecins sont au cœur de ces réflexions et contribuent à faire évoluer les pratiques.

 - 💰 Des conditions attractives. Nous proposons une rémunération attractive (à partir de 90€/h), une flexibilité d’organisation et l'opportunité de grandir au sein d'une communauté médicale engagée.

notes: Healthcare-focused company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, including software engineers, medical professionals, and customer success managers.
